title: bonafousia brachyantha
intro: Bonafousia brachyantha, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as the 'small-leafed milkwood'. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bonafousia brachyantha include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used to make a topical paste for skin irritations.
